title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.030 - For-profit corporations excluded from act
text:
354.030.  For-profit corporations excluded from act. — No group, association or organization created for or engaged in business or activity for profit, provision for the incorporation of which is made by any of the corporation laws of this state, shall be organized or operate, directly or indirectly, as a health services corporation under sections 354.010 to 354.380.
(L. 1973 S.B. 3 § 5, A.L. 1983 H.B. 127)
